_comment: Declarative workflow definition for output-validator. Validates a governed JSON artifact or produced Office/PDF document for schema conformance, governance rules, and structural integrity — before it ships.
description: Pre-ship validation: schema check → governance rules → structural integrity → quality gate on validation report

steps.note: JSON: required keys, human_review_required:true, no empty/fabricated standards, no real PII. Docs: OPC/ODF/PDF structural integrity.
Apply rule-catalog.md: no fabrication, no real SSN/non-555-phone, no auto-approval without evidence

note: Stdlib-first — core checks run with zero optional libraries. jsonschema / deep OOXML / veraPDF activate when present and are reported as skipped (not failed) when absent. Structural validity is necessary, not sufficient.
